questions.question: Explore the significance of management in organizations and its relevance to engineering students. Discuss the functions of management as essential skills for organizational success.
What are the differences between formal and informal organization? Explain with suitable examples.
Discuss different types of organization structure. Differentiate between line organization and matrix organization?
Compare Maslow’s hierarchy of needs with Herzberg’s dual factor theory of motivation.
Define leadership. Also explain the essential qualities of an effective leader.
Define grievances. Explain the main causes of grievances and discuss the methods used for their settlement.
What are the different sources of recruitment? Explain factors affecting recruitment.
Highlight the importance of performance appraisal in organization. Explain any two methods of performance appraisal with suitable examples.
Explain the types of training methods with suitable examples.
State the current challenges of industrial relation in Nepal. What can be done to overcome these challenges?
Define conflict management in the context of IT organizations. Explain the role and importance of conflict management in IT companies or teams.
Define intra-personal, inter-personal, inter-group, and inter-organizational conflicts. Explore the sources of inter-personal conflict within organizations.
